extName.message: DeBait – Tunay na thumbnail sa YouTube, walang clickbait
extName.description: Extension name / store title (shown in browser and store).

extDescription.message: Awtomatikong pinapalitan ang clickbait na thumbnail sa YouTube ng tunay na unang frame ng video. Magaan, pribado, walang setup.
extDescription.description: Short description (manifest; Chrome caps at 132 chars).
